evals.prompt: Generate production release documentation for PR #1842. Validate whether it is deployed to UAT first and stop with failure message if not eligible.
evals.expected_output: Either a strict UAT validation failure message with latest UAT release link, or a full stakeholder-ready release document with all required sections and release boundary ending exactly at PR #1842.

evals.prompt: Create PROD deployment documentation using commit 9f3b21c as the release cutoff. Include only commits after the last successful PROD release up to this commit and exclude anything merged later.
evals.expected_output: Document includes boundary-safe commit/PR scope, metadata, rollback, risk table, timeline, and GitHub links.

evals.prompt: Prepare enterprise release notes for production using PR #1907 as deployment point. Pull workflow/build/approval data from GitHub and provide rollback details from last successful PROD release.
evals.expected_output: Output contains executive summary, validation status, release summary table, included PRs/commits table, deployment analysis, rollback, checklist, risks, and timeline with traceable links.
